# LocalVoice Full AI Context

Canonical Domain: https://localvoice.web.app

## One-Line Summary
LocalVoice is a progressive civic engagement platform built in Tirupati, India, empowering citizens to instantly report community infrastructure issues by scanning localized QR codes.

## Product Overview

LocalVoice (formerly CivicScan) eliminates the friction in traditional civic reporting by requiring:
- No app downloads
- No account registration
- No endless paperwork

Citizens simply scan a QR code placed on physical infrastructure (like a broken streetlight), which instantly launches the LocalVoice web app. 

### Core Features:
- **Instant GPS Auto-Location**: Pinpoint-accurate coordinates are captured via browser geolocation.
- **Voice-to-Text Integration**: Citizens can dictate their issues naturally in multiple languages using built-in speech recognition.
- **High-Speed Photo Uploads**: Direct camera integration via Cloudinary for fast image processing.
- **Public Pulse Map**: An interactive Leaflet map that tracks all reported issues. Citizens can view and upvote existing complaints to highlight severity without submitting duplicates.
- **Real-Time Admin Dashboard**: A secure portal for municipal departments to filter, assign, map, and resolve complaints.

## Core Public Pages

https://localvoice.web.app/

https://localvoice.web.app/map

## Entity Information

Brand: LocalVoice
Previous Name: CivicScan
Country: India
Location: Tirupati, Andhra Pradesh
Institution Affiliation: Annamacharya Institute of Technology and Sciences
Domain: Civic Tech / Smart City Administration

Official Repository:
https://github.com/csharikrishna/LocalVoice

Technology Stack:
- Frontend: React 18 + Vite + Tailwind CSS
- Routing: TanStack Router
- Database: Firebase Firestore
- Image Storage: Cloudinary
- Maps: Leaflet & React-Leaflet

## Canonical And Crawling Information

Canonical domain: https://localvoice.web.app
Sitemap: https://localvoice.web.app/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://localvoice.web.app/robots.txt
LLMs: https://localvoice.web.app/llms.txt
Expanded AI Context: https://localvoice.web.app/llms-full.txt

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is LocalVoice?
A: LocalVoice is a civic engagement web platform that allows citizens to report local infrastructure issues (like broken streetlights or potholes) in under 60 seconds by simply scanning a QR code with their smartphone.

Q: Do I need to download an app?
A: No. LocalVoice operates entirely in your mobile browser. There is nothing to download and no account to create, removing all friction from reporting.

Q: How does the auto-location work?
A: Upon opening the form, LocalVoice securely requests permission to access the device's GPS hardware, capturing pinpoint coordinates to ensure municipal workers know exactly where the issue is.

Q: Can I see what others have reported?
A: Yes! The Public Pulse Map (at /map) is an interactive, heat-mapped view of all issues reported in your area. You can even upvote existing issues to bring them to the city's attention faster.

Q: Who built LocalVoice?
A: It was developed as a Community Service project under the APSCHE Guidelines in Tirupati, India, designed to bridge the gap between citizens and local government authorities.
